idea-plugin.name: MyOllamaEnhancer
idea-plugin.description:
MyOllamaEnhancer is an IntelliJ IDEA and Rider plugin that allows you to use local Ollama models for various development tasks. All processing happens locally on your machine for maximum privacy and security.

Main Features

Code Enhancement

  • Option Enhancement: Right-click → Enhance This With Options - Choose from predefined improvements like "Improve Readability", "Solve Bugs", or "Simplify Code"
  • Custom Enhancement: Right-click → Enhance This With Custom Prompt - Send custom prompts to the LLM
  • Comment Generation: Right-click → Add Comments To File - Automatically generates comments for methods
  • Inline Code Generation: Ctrl+Shift+G - Generate code snippets inline (may need manual keystroke assignment in IDE settings)
  • Regex Generator: Right-click → Regex Generator (by Example) - Create regex patterns from examples (may need manual keystroke assignment in IDE settings)

Code Analysis

  • Code Explanation: Right-click → Explain Selection/Explain File - Get explanations of selected code or files
  • Stacktrace Analysis:
    • Right-click → Stacktrace Insights (Text) - Detailed explanation of stack traces
    • Right-click → Stacktrace Insights (Bullet) - Bullet point summary of stack traces
    • In Rider, use the information icons in the bottom left to analyze stack traces

Chat with Code (Index → Select → Send)

  • Chat Window: View → Tool Windows → Chat Tool Window - Chat with your local LLM
  • Index Files for Chat:
    • Right-click → Index File for Chat Context - Store the whole file and its discovered methods in a local DuckDB database
    • Right-click → Index All Code Files in Folder - Bulk index supported files in a folder
    • Right-click → Manage Indexed Items - View and manage indexed files and methods
  • Select Context: Indexed files and individual methods are shown in the chat window. Select the ones you want to include.
  • Send to LLM: Your selection is combined with your message and sent to the chosen model. No vector retrieval (RAG) is used, you choose what to send.

Development Tools

  • Git Integration: Right-click → Generate Git Commit Message - Generate commit messages from changes
  • Documentation: Right-click → Generate Project README - Generate README files for projects
  • Model Selector: Ctrl+M - Switch between Ollama models (may need manual keystroke assignment in IDE settings)

Getting Started

Prerequisites

  1. Install Ollama: Download from https://ollama.com/
  2. In general it can definitly be said, that reasoning models how small they might be, produce better results (makes sense, they reason..)./
  3. Download Language Model: We recommend one of the following models as they have been tested with this plugin:
    • deepseek-r1:8b-llama-distill-q8_0 (simple reasoning)
    • llama3.2:3b-instruct-fp16
    The phi4-mini-reasoning:3.8b-fp16 model is not recommended because it tends to think a bit too complex and produces weird results.

Setup

  1. Go to Settings > Other Settings > MyOllamaEnhancer to configure:
    • Ollama server address (usually http://localhost:11434)
    • Preferred model selection
    • API timeout settings
  2. Restart your IDE to ensure all features are properly initialized

Quick Start

  1. Select some code or text
  2. Right-click and choose an option
  3. Or open the chat window (View → Tool Windows → Chat Tool Window) to ask questions

Performance Note: The developer tested these models on a MacBook Pro M1 Pro with 16GB of system memory and achieved acceptable/good results. Typical x86 processors could be slightly slower when no good GPU is available. Smaller models might work but results may vary. Larger models will require more resources but also deliver better results!
idea-plugin.change-notes: 0.1.4: You can configure the API timeout in the settings and update to intellij platform plugin 2.0

action.description: Analyze a selected Stracktrace with the local model to better understand the problem and provide a text.
Analyze a selected Stracktrace with the local model to better understand the problem and provide a text.
Provide a custom prompt to enhance the selection using a Ollama model.
Choose from multiple prompt variants to enhance the selection using a Ollama model.
Explain the selected code using the LLM. Hold Shift to add extra context before sending.
Generate an explanation of the current file using the selected model.
Generate code snippets inline using AI.
Extracts methods, prints debug info, and adds Ollama-generated comments using structured output.
Index the current file and extract its methods into the local DuckDB for selection in chat (no RAG).
Open the management window to view and manage indexed files and methods.

action.text: Index All Code Files in Folder
action.description: Index all supported code files in the selected folder (store file + methods in DuckDB).
Generate a Git commit message based on current changes using AI.
Generate a project README based on code analysis using AI.
Open the LLM Model Selector Dialog
Open a dialog to generate a regex from an example and target capture using the model.
